antipattern.symptom: PM dominates whole hour; design + eng leave with no decisions.
Same topic reappears next week; decisions never persist.
antipattern.fix: Decision-log section required in artefact; validator rejects empty array.

antipattern.symptom: Eng sends a deputy; deputy can't commit; decisions deferred.
antipattern.fix: Cancel + reschedule when role unavailable; no deputies.

antipattern.symptom: Prior decisions never revisited; ritual loses credibility.
antipattern.fix: Fixed last-week-outcomes block at top of every session.
